full_text:
Jiao Chu 焦觸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiao Chu (焦觸). Served Yuan Xi with Zhang Nan. Betrayed to Cao Cao. Killed by Han Dang at Chibi. Jiao Chu was affiliated with Yuan Shao, Yuan Xi, and the Wei Kingdom.
